text_raw: How disappointing. You couldn't even carry out your mother's command.
text_clean: How disappointing. You couldn't even carry out your mother's command.

text_raw: Not that I ever expected much from you.
text_clean: Not that I ever expected much from you.

text_raw: You've served your purpose. Now, I'll reclaim my power.
text_clean: You've served your purpose. Now, I'll reclaim my power.

text_raw: Greymane...
text_clean: Greymane...

text_raw: How... precious.
text_clean: How... precious.

text_raw: Just like my child, you need to be... broken in!
text_clean: Just like my child, you need to be... broken in!

text_raw: As I thought... you're the far superior being.
text_clean: As I thought... you're the far superior being.

text_raw: Greymane, will you not be my son?
text_clean: Greymane, will you not be my son?

text_raw: I can feel it, a yearning within you!
text_clean: I can feel it, a yearning within you!

text_raw: A power more suited to me...
text_clean: A power more suited to me...

text_raw: ...different from my child...
text_clean: ...different from my child...

text_raw: ...pure power!
text_clean: ...pure power!

text_raw: Fear always dwelled within that child.
text_clean: Fear always dwelled within that child.

text_raw: But you are different. You are perfection!
text_clean: But you are different. You are perfection!

text_raw: You've come all this way to fill my empty void.
text_clean: You've come all this way to fill my empty void.

text_raw: Deep down, you already know...
text_clean: Deep down, you already know...

text_raw: that joining me is the only choice.
text_clean: that joining me is the only choice.

text_raw: You desire me, don't you?
text_clean: You desire me, don't you?

text_raw: He was never worthy of being my son.
text_clean: He was never worthy of being my son.

text_raw: His pitiful sobs of "mother, mother!" grated at my very soul.
text_clean: His pitiful sobs of "mother, mother!" grated at my very soul.

text_raw: Perhaps I should thank you for ridding me of the nuisance.
text_clean: Perhaps I should thank you for ridding me of the nuisance.

text_raw: Now, show me all that you're capable of!
text_clean: Now, show me all that you're capable of!

text_raw: Watching you from afar for so long has set my very blood aflame!
text_clean: Watching you from afar for so long has set my very blood aflame!

text_raw: Let's see if you truly live up to my expectations!
text_clean: Let's see if you truly live up to my expectations!

text_raw: You're the only one worthy to be called my son!
text_clean: You're the only one worthy to be called my son!

text_raw: White Crow is nothing but a fragile husk of my form,
text_clean: White Crow is nothing but a fragile husk of my form,

text_raw: yet, she molded you into a fine warrior...
text_clean: yet, she molded you into a fine warrior...

text_raw: Consider it, Greymane!
text_clean: Consider it, Greymane!

text_raw: If such a wretch could shape you into this,
text_clean: If such a wretch could shape you into this,

text_raw: think of what you could be by my side!
text_clean: think of what you could be by my side!

text_raw: You will be mine, Greymane!
text_clean: You will be mine, Greymane!

text_raw: I'll be waiting... until the time comes.
text_clean: I'll be waiting... until the time comes.

text_raw: Foul-tongued... witch!
text_clean: Foul-tongued... witch!

text_raw: Your words reek of deceit, witch.
text_clean: Your words reek of deceit, witch.

text_raw: You're what twisted him.
text_clean: You're what twisted him.

text_raw: Grow stronger... so I can enjoy you properly.
text_clean: Grow stronger... so I can enjoy you properly.

text_raw: Run all you like... You'll always be mine.
text_clean: Run all you like... You'll always be mine.

text_raw: Do not disappoint me.
text_clean: Do not disappoint me.

text_raw: Surely this isn't the extent of your power.
text_clean: Surely this isn't the extent of your power.

text_raw: Savor every ounce of agony I grant you.
text_clean: Savor every ounce of agony I grant you.

text_raw: Fragile little things... how I yearn to break them.
text_clean: Fragile little things... how I yearn to break them.

text_raw: You're even more perfect in the flesh.
text_clean: You're even more perfect in the flesh.

text_raw: Come on... Let me feel the full extent of your devotion.
text_clean: Come on... Let me feel the full extent of your devotion.

text_raw: Lovely... now you're all the more tempting.
text_clean: Lovely... now you're all the more tempting.

text_raw: You can protest, but I see it... You crave me.
text_clean: You can protest, but I see it... You crave me.
